name: Meaford Sunrise Waterfront
swimVerdict: 50 feet of private sandy beach with gentle sloping entry into Georgian Bay. Crystal clear water, excellent for swimming and snorkeling. Views of Meaford Bluffs and Blue Mountains from the cottage.
julyNotes: July 11 appears booked but most of July wide open. Weekly rentals Friday-Friday during summer. Updated March 3, 2026.
notes: TRUE WATERFRONT gem on Georgian Bay. 4 bedrooms all with queen beds. Pet-friendly ($10/day). Private sandy beach is the real deal. Owner Doug highly rated. A second 2-bedroom cottage next door can be rented for overflow. Cleaning fee $175. $400 refundable security deposit. Reviews: 4.8/5 stars. Best waterfront value in the Georgian Bay region at $2,200/week.

name: Georgian Bay Holiday Haven
swimVerdict: 5-minute walk to beautiful Meaford beaches on Georgian Bay. Multiple beaches within walking distance. Not waterfront but very close.
julyNotes: July has scattered bookings but multiple weeks appear available. Calendar updated March 16, 2026. Contact owner for specific July weeks.
notes: Modern, beautifully upgraded vacation home in the HEART of Meaford. Walking distance to beach, marina, shops, restaurants, LCBO. 37 high-quality photos on listing. Near Wasaga Beach, Sauble Beach, Owen Sound, Collingwood/Blue Mountain. $200-400/night (~$2,100/week estimated). Fully equipped with life-size Connect 4 and corn hole games. Great for families. Natural gas BBQ means never running out. Excellent reviews.

name: House of Lords - Georgian Bay Waterfront
swimVerdict: Flat shoreline with shallow entry into remarkably clear Georgian Bay water. Excellent snorkeling. Swim raft provided. Safe for kids with gradual entry. Crystal clear water typical of the Wiarton/Bruce Peninsula area.
julyNotes: Contact Cottage Vacations for July 2026 availability. Managed by Ontario's premier rental company (since 1999). Popular property - book early.
notes: Charming waterfront cottage with BUNKIE for extra sleeping. 3 bedrooms + bunkie with queen bed = sleeps 8. Flat shoreline is ideal for kids. Clear water for snorkeling. 20 min from Wiarton. Boat docking available at Wiarton Marina. Boat launch at Big Bay 6km away. Pillows/blankets provided but bring your own linens/towels. Price estimated at ~$2,000/week for this category on Cottage Vacations.

name: 603 Third Avenue North
swimVerdict: Less than 1-MINUTE WALK to Sauble Beach — 11km of pristine sandy beach on Lake Huron. Warm shallow water, world-class sunsets. One of Ontario's best swimming beaches.
julyNotes: Calendar shows July 2026 — availability not yet fully marked. Contact office at 519-422-1313 for specific weeks. Saturday-Saturday rentals. Families only.
notes: Classic Sauble Beach cottage on a corner lot. 1 King, 1 Queen, 1 Double, 2 sets of single bunks + 2 pullout couches. Great for larger families. Pool table and trampoline keep kids busy. Price estimated ~$2,200/week for Sauble Beach in peak season. Managed by Sauble Beach Cottage Rentals (reputable local agency).

name: 144 Albemarle Crescent
swimVerdict: 5-minute walk to Sauble Beach's famous 11km sandy shoreline on Lake Huron. Warm, shallow water perfect for families. World-class sunsets.
julyNotes: Calendar shows July 2026 dates. Contact office at 519-422-1313. Sunday-Sunday rentals. Families only. No pets.
notes: PREMIUM cottage on quiet crescent with exquisite landscaping. Bright and airy two-story. Central AC is a big plus for July heat. 3 Queen beds + bunk beds + pullout sofa. Two separate living areas. Covered back deck. Well-maintained grounds. No pets allowed. This is the upscale pick for Sauble Beach.

name: 21 Silver Lake Crescent
swimVerdict: 10-minute walk to Lake Huron's sandy beach, plus minutes from Silver Lake shoreline. Two water bodies to choose from. Beach wagon and chairs provided. 2 kayaks + canoe included for water exploration.
julyNotes: Calendar shows July 2026. Contact office for availability. Saturday-Saturday rentals. No pets.
notes: Charming cottage nestled in trees with abundant privacy. Cathedral ceiling with stone propane fireplace. 2 Queen beds + single-over-double bunk. Access to BOTH Silver Lake and Lake Huron. The included kayaks and canoe are a huge bonus — explore Sauble by water. PS4 for rainy days. Budget-friendly at estimated $1,800/week. The best value pick for Sauble Beach.

name: Out of the Blue - Family Cottage
swimVerdict: 5-minute walk to Port Elgin's beautiful sandy beach on Lake Huron. North Shore Park Splash Pad nearby for kids. Sheltered swimming areas. Stunning sunsets over the lake.
julyNotes: July shows first two weeks may have some bookings, but weeks of July 18-25 and July 25-Aug 1 appear available. Calendar updated Feb 4, 2026. Saturday-Saturday rentals.
notes: EXCELLENT VALUE at $2,100/week summer rate ($1,250 off-season). 15 photos on listing. 4 bedrooms: 2 queens + 2 double/single bunks. Fenced backyard big enough for badminton/volleyball. Walking distance to downtown, shopping, restaurants, beaches. 6 reviews all 5-stars. Bring your own linens/towels. $300 refundable deposit. Closest region to Sarnia at just 2h 15min drive. Near Diana & Klaus.

name: The Miramichi Bayview
swimVerdict: Directly across the road from Miramichi Bay on Lake Huron. Sandy beach access steps away. Located on the Great Lakes Waterfront Trail for walking/biking along the lakeshore.
julyNotes: No availability calendar displayed on listing. Contact owner directly. Newly renovated four-season cottage.
notes: Newly renovated 4-season cottage BETWEEN Port Elgin and Southampton — best of both towns. 5 bedrooms (3 main floor + 2 basement) with 2 full baths. Basement has rec room with wood stove. Direct access to Woodland Trail from backyard. On the Great Lakes Waterfront Trail. Pet-friendly. Families or quiet groups only. World-famous Lake Huron sunsets from front deck. Estimated ~$2,000/week.

name: VFamily Cottage - Beach 4
swimVerdict: 1-minute walk to Beach Area 4 — one of the best stretches of Wasaga's 14km of sandy shoreline (longest freshwater beach in the world). Warm, shallow Georgian Bay water. Dog-friendly Beach 3 also within walking distance.
julyNotes: Popular repeat-booking property. Contact owner Oswald directly. Multiple glowing reviews from July stays. $900-2,400/week range depending on season.
notes: PROVEN WINNER — 8 reviews averaging 4.7/5 stars with multiple families rebooking year after year. Quiet dead-end street, no through traffic. Close to park for kids. Owner Oswald is responsive and accommodating. 15-20 min to Blue Mountain/Collingwood. Veranda with bay views. 5G WiFi is excellent. The most reviewed and trusted Wasaga option.

name: VFamily Cottage 2 - Steps to Beach 4
swimVerdict: Steps from Beach Area 4 on Georgian Bay — 14km of pristine sandy shoreline. Safe family-friendly beach with no public parking on the street (quiet). Kids can play freely. Listen to waves from the front patio.
julyNotes: New listing (DI-42974). Part of dual-rental option — can combine with front cottage for groups up to 20. Contact owner for July 2026 weeks. $1,000-2,000/week range.
notes: Same great location as VFamily Cottage but newer listing. 3-bedroom bungalow with bright open living space and hardwood floors. Dead-end street with no public parking = extra safe for kids. Walk to Tim Hortons/McDonald's. 15-20 min to Blue Mountain. Can be rented alongside the front cottage for extended family groups up to 20. Budget-friendly at $1,000-2,000/week.
